title: Que's BTA Additions
description: Adds functional stained glass to Better Than Adventure. More to come later...
body:
Adds functional stained glass to Better Than Adventure with more things to come. The glass is paintable and available in all 16 colors.
![Stained glass doors, trap doors, and blocks in all 16 colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a80d48ade19d6118450aeb5f95ca1fdcba0f8c.png)
